testcase.name: test_post_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 401/403, got 200: {"id":180,"post_id":"post_fe6f32ebde34","user_id":"user_a1b203440a53","text":"iter218 no-auth test","media":"[]","type":"post","visibility":"friends","likes_count":0,"comments_count":0,"shares_count": assert 200 in (401, 403) + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
